```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Reduce I/O wait time across disk and network paths.
---
Task:
Identify I/O-bound operations and optimize read/write patterns for lower wait time.
Requirements:
Measure syscall/network timings, payload sizes, batching behavior, and concurrency limits.
Constraints:
Keep protocol compatibility, durability guarantees, and retry semantics intact.
Success Criteria:
Show reduced I/O wait and end-to-end latency with clear before/after evidence.
```
